sections.description: Runtime wrapper, storage guards, DOM references, constants, authoritative data tables, platform configuration.
Procedural music, audio diagnostics, sound synthesis, voice pools, and sound dispatch.
Input state, relic research metadata, damage types, coordinate helpers, canvas sizing, camera, and fullscreen.
Game state, run lifecycle, reconstruction undo snapshots, save-facing state helpers, and debug controls.
Upgrade purchasing/UI logic, player movement and weapons, and active relic runtime systems.
Enemy generations, mutations, roster selection, AI, carriers, minibosses, bosses, and enemy spawning.
Projectiles, collisions, explosions, regeneration, point orbs, pickups, particles, damage numbers, and shake.
Background generation and all arena/entity rendering helpers.
UI updates, main loop, touch controls, and gamepad input.
Event registration, versioned persistence, lifecycle saves, initialization, and runtime closure.

policy: Edit files in src/, then run python tools/build_game.py. game.js is generated and remains the browser entry point.
